description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the drecom/centos-ruby:2.4.0 Docker image and defines a BUNDLE_CACHE variable pointing to vendor/bundle/. Add a global before_script that runs `bundle check --path=${BUNDLE_CACHE} || bundle install --path=${BUNDLE_CACHE} --jobs=2 --retry=3` and configure a cache with key $CI_BUILD_NAME storing the vendor/bundle/ directory (including untracked files). Define a single stage named deploy and a job called pages in that stage that executes `bundle exec rake generate`. The pages job should publish the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact and run only on the master branch.
